tool_args.label: MTA LIRR Title VI complaints total 2023

payload.raw_value_text: 66 Title VI and related discrimination complaints were filed, citing 72 separate bases and 1 Title VI lawsuit

payload.claim_text: Based on the MTA LIRR utilization analysis, underrepresentation for females occurred in Professionals - Whites, Administrative Support - Asian and Whites, Skilled Craft - Hispanics and Whites. Underrepresentation for minority males occurred in Officials and Administrators - Hispanics.

tool_args.label: MTA LIRR action strategy for underutilization

payload.claim_text: MTA LIRR's action strategy to address areas of underutilization: Forecast Future Opportunities, Identify specific job titles within underutilized EEO categories, Meet with the People Department, Departmental Engagement, Focus on Underutilized Categories. Predominate areas of underutilization for females is in Administrative Support and Skilled Craft categories. Underutilization for minority males was found in the Officials & Administrator category.

tool_args.label: Internal EEO complaints most cited basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis internally was Race/Color.

tool_args.label: Title VI complaints most cited basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis was race.

Connections: Diversity in Motion is our theme for this year. Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging are essential components of our daily interactions, work relationships, & communication within the organization.

payload.description: For the second year the B.E.G.I.N. ERG celebrated the end of Kwanzaa with an Umoja after-work networking event.
B.E.G.I.N. celebrated Black History Month with a focus on African American Leaders in Transportation History. The BHM Cultural Celebration was held on February 22, 2024.
EWT led the celebration with its 2nd annual Soles4Souls Shoe Drive, International Women Day Panel/Book Club Kick Off Event, and the Empower Her Celebration in which 24 women for 2024 were recognized.

tool_args.label: MTA Five Year DEI Strategic Plan

payload.event_name: MTA Five Year Diversity Equity and Inclusion Strategic Plan
payload.description: Through this first-ever MTA Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion Strategic Plan, we're reaffirming our commitment to actively listen to the voices of our constituents and intentionally engage them as we strive to make meaningful improvements and expansion of our own DEI efforts.

tool_args.label: MTA LIRR is part of MTA

payload.description: MTA Long Island Rail Road is an agency of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority
